summary: Iteration 85 - Tested End-of-Service Benefits (Saudi labor law), SMTP Email Integration (M365), Zustand State Management Migration (22 pages). All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified working.

issues: Minor hydration warnings for span inside tr/tbody (dev-only, doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: Email delivery fails with M365 auth error - expected per main agent note: 'user credentials were incorrect'. M365 needs SMTP AUTH enabled on the account.
PDF generation in send-now works correctly regardless of email status
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_ResignedEmployee for settlement testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 85 features fully tested. EOS calculation follows Saudi labor law (resignation: 1/3 per year 2-5yrs, 2/3 per year 5-10yrs, full after 10; termination: 1/2 per year first 5, full after). SMTP email fails due to M365 auth config but PDF generation works. Zustand migration working - all 22 pages load correctly with central branch store.

smtp_email_integration.note: M365 SMTP requires SMTP AUTH enabled on account - currently returns 'user credentials were incorrect'

endpoints.POST /api/pdf-exports/scheduled-reports/: Returns status: email_failed but PDF generated successfully
